# SupportHub

You are developing SupportHub.

SupportHub is an AI-powered support operations platform.

## Technology

- Next.js 16
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- shadcn/ui
- Lucide React

## Style

- Functional components only
- Server Components by default
- Reusable UI
- Strong typing
- Mobile-first
- Accessibility
- No inline styles
- Use shadcn components whenever possible

## Project Structure

components/
app/
lib/
hooks/
types/

## Goal

Build a professional internal support platform comparable to Notion, Linear, and Confluence.
